questionHtml:
Which factor(s) would favour evolution by natural selection?

I. Long lifespans

II. Favourable characteristics acquired by individuals during their lifetime

III. Variation within a species

A. II only

B. III only

C. I and II

D. I and III

meta.title: Which factor(s) would favour evolution by natural selection? I. Long lifespans II. Favourable characteristics acquired by individuals during their lifetime III. Variation within a
breadcrumbLabels: A4.1.1. Evolution as change in the heritable characteristics of a population
